stemHtml: The aircraft's call sign is RUSHAIR 142. In the cruise, the pilots receive the following radio transmission. “ALL STATIONS, STOP SENDING CPDLC REQUESTS UNTIL ADVISED”. What should they do?

options.a: Perform a CPDLC Log-off and Log-on again to resume normal CPDLC operation.
options.b: Stop sending CPDLC requests and revert to voice communication.
options.c: Revert to voice communication and ask for a frequency change.
options.d: Send “WILCO” via CPDLC and wait for further instructions.
